name_en: Chane1💦23k New Rolled Edge Flap Bag Adjustable 🦋AS4451♨️ Simply too beautiful haha, I think this looks great and goes well with casual wear! ✅ Has chain and adjustable buckle, petite girls can also wear it crossbody. 🍬 Beautiful bottom details, capacity is also OK 👍 The real thing is beautiful, texture is great. Dimensions: 19×12×5cm
